members.name: docker-init
members.cmdline:
/sbin/docker-init -- /bin/sh -c echo Container started
trap "exit 0" 15
/usr/local/share/ssh-init.sh
/usr/local/share/docker-init.sh
exec "$@"
while sleep 1 & wait $!; do :; done -

/sbin/docker-init -- /bin/sh -c echo Container started
trap "exit 0" 15
/usr/local/share/ssh-init.sh
/usr/local/share/docker-init.sh
exec "$@"
while sleep 1 & wait $!; do :; done -
